name: Brussel Sprouts in Pecan Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brussel sprouts, covered in boiling salted water until tender, about 10 minutes. Drain. Keep warm.
2. Heat the butter in a small saucepan and brown the pecans; do not let them burn. Pour the pecans over the Brussel Sprouts and serve. Serves 4 to 6.
